name: More Better Gakujo
subtitle: Unofficial iOS/iPadOS builds for technical users.
description: More Better Gakujo is an unofficial Flutter app for opening Niigata University's Gakujo system with 2FA autofill and easier material downloads. This source is for self-signed SideStore/AltStore-style installation only.

apps.name: More Better Gakujo
apps.subtitle: Unofficial Gakujo helper app.
apps.localizedDescription: More Better Gakujo opens Niigata University's Gakujo system in an app WebView and helps with 2FA autofill and material downloads. This iOS/iPadOS build is distributed as an IPA for users who understand self-signing with SideStore or Sideloadly.

versions.localizedDescription: Cross-platform feature parity changes, original extension README features, download/save improvements, GPA display/sort features, and desktop zoom fixes.
